comments.author: reader
comments.text: Kava bars are actually dual-purpose. They are casual hangouts during the day. At night they are open until 2am.

comments.author: reader
comments.text: People play poker here (poker nights Tuesday and Thursday) and chess and Magic: The Gathering.

comments.author: reader
comments.text: That's not me working on the computer, but that's the vibe...it's a place where people can come and work and have the ambient social aspect too.

comments.author: reader
comments.text: This is where the owner makes money with the late-night crowd. Girlie drinks haha.

comments.author: reader
comments.text: The no-alchohol angle is interesting. You have recovering alcoholics as customers. That's NOT the main draw, just to be clear. But it's as much a bar as a coffee shop.  Kava and kratom are stimulants. The owner smokes weed.

comments.author: reader
comments.text: Kombucha is outdated, I think. The main drinks are kava and kratom tea. But kombucha is in the vibe.

comments.author: reader
comments.text: The staff is mostly female. I will tell the owner we need photos. The women are young, friendly, and easy going.
